name_cn:
❤️ M44874
PALM SPRINGS Medium Backpack
This backpack style, which shone at the 2016 Spring/Summer show, is stylish and unique. It continues the gorgeous silhouette, embodying the LV spirit in the details.
Detailed Features
30 x 33 x 16 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram coated canvas
Soft calfskin trim
Adjustable shoulder straps
Nylon lining
Gold-tone metal hardware
Double zipper closure
Front zip pocket
Handle: Single handle
